quiz.addQuizDescription: Create a quiz in one language — English, Sinhala, or Tamil.
quiz.quizDetailsDescription: Pick one content language. All questions in this quiz must use that language only.
quiz.contentLanguageHint: One quiz = one language. You cannot mix Sinhala, Tamil, and English in the same quiz.
quiz.uiLanguageHint: Admin UI language (does not change the quiz content language).
quiz.durationHint: Time limit for completing the quiz.

validation.titleRequired: Title is required in the quiz language (min 3 characters).
validation.descriptionRequired: Description is required in the quiz language (min 10 characters).
validation.durationMin: Duration must be at least 5 minutes.
validation.passingScoreRange: Passing score must be between 1 and 100.
validation.questionRequired: At least one question is required.
validation.choiceRequired: Each MCQ question needs at least 2 choices.
validation.correctRequired: Each MCQ question needs one correct answer.
validation.bankLanguageMismatch: Every attached bank question must have text in the quiz language.

timer.timedOut: Time is up! Submitting your answers...

student.myQuizzesDescription: View and take quizzes assigned to you.
student.noQuizzes: No quizzes are available right now. Check back later!
student.question: Question
student.submitConfirmDescription: Once submitted, you cannot change your answers.
student.submitConfirmUnanswered: You have {count} unanswered question(s). They will be marked incorrect.
student.tabSwitchWarning: Tab switch detected! Violation {count}/3. Leaving again may auto-submit your quiz.
student.tabSwitchLocked: Too many tab switches. Submitting your quiz...
student.timerPaused: Timer paused — return to this tab to continue.
student.betterLuck: You did not reach the passing score. Better luck next time!
student.timedOutMessage: Your time ran out before you submitted.
student.quickTipBody: Don't leave any questions blank! Points are only awarded for correct answers.

hero.title: Successfully conquer the approaching Scholarship milestone
hero.description: Face the exam fearlessly; you too can wear the crown of victory! The home of winners — take your step today to achieve an outstanding victory in the Scholarship Examination.

public.categorySubtitle: Practice papers linked to this category — pick a module to narrow quizzes.
public.noQuizzesInModule: No quizzes in this module yet.
public.noQuizzesYet: No published quizzes yet. Check back soon!
public.cardFallbackDesc: Practice questions curated for focused revision.

chat.title: Kadaima Expert
chat.subtitle: Ask about quizzes, unlocks, or your account
chat.greeting: Hi! I'm the Kadaima Expert. Ask me anything about quizzes, subscriptions, or your account. Or tap Chat on WhatsApp to continue on your phone.
chat.errorMessage: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
chat.whatsappHint: Opens WhatsApp — our bot replies on your phone
chat.teaserMessage: Hi! Need help with a quiz or your account? Tap to chat.

public.unlockHint: This quiz requires payment verification before you can start.
public.accountDetailsHint: Your account details from the server will be used — no form needed.
public.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Log in
public.invalidMobile: Enter a valid Sri Lankan mobile number (07XXXXXXXX).
public.pleaseLogInAgain: Please log in again to start.
public.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please log in again.

profilePage.title: My Profile
profilePage.subtitle: Update your personal details.
profilePage.updateError: Could not update your profile. Try again.
profilePage.loginRequired: Please log in to view your profile.

paymentsPage.title: My Payments
paymentsPage.subtitle: Your subscription and quiz unlock payments.
paymentsPage.noPayments: You haven't made any payments yet.
paymentsPage.loginRequired: Please log in to view your payments.
